days.notes: Haven guests board from 11am via priority. Suite 12846. Request suite decoration for anniversary from concierge at boarding. Muster drill required.

ANNIVERSARY DAY. Holly spa: Targeted Technology Facial (2:00pm, 50 min) — confirmed. Holly also has Thermal Suite 7-Day Pass (activates tonight at 8pm). Anniversary dinner at specialty restaurant — book via concierge Day 1. Suite décor already arranged.
reservations: Holly spa: Targeted Technology Facial — 2:00pm (✅ confirmed)
Anniversary dinner — book Day 1 via concierge
Rocket Man show (Haven priority seating via concierge)

days.notes: EXCURSION BOOKED: Howler Monkey River Expedition (BPIN11) — 11:00am departure. Boat cruise up Monkey River through rainforest; wildlife includes howler monkeys, crocodiles, iguanas, herons. Late arrival (10:30am) — plan accordingly. All aboard 5:30pm.
EXCURSION BOOKED: Monkeys, Sloths & Macaws — Noon departure. Pre-noon: explore port area. Post-excursion: back to ship, Haven pool. GF tip: ship food much safer than port street food.
Explore Chacchoben Mayan ruins or beach day at Mahahual. No major excursion booked — decide onboard. Short cab ride to ruins (~40 min).

EXCURSION BOOKED: Exclusive VIP Dolphin Swim at Dolphinaris (CZMN42) — 9:30am departure. VIP tier = private group, no long waits. Actual dolphin interaction: kisses, dorsal fin rides. No phones/cameras in water — buy Dolphinaris photos after (~$40 each or ~$350 full set). Post-excursion: downtown San Miguel shopping (silver jewelry, vanilla, Kahlúa — walkable from pier).
Last full day at sea. Haven deck and pool, casino (final session), packing begins tonight. Syd Norman's for evening entertainment. Butler gratuity.
Haven guests disembark first — concierge will arrange priority disembarkation. Collect checked luggage. Arrange transport to airport/hotel in advance.
